arts.ttl: Preview: Swansea City vs. West Bromwich Albion - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Swansea City and West Bromwich Albion, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

Swansea suffered a humiliating 4-0 away defeat against a struggling Portsmouth side on New Year's Day as their 2025 got off to the worst possible start at Fratton Park. Luke Williams' side now retur...

arts.ttl: West Brom make immediate January transfer decision after departure
arts.sum: Towering centre half Taylor has only made 10 senior appearances for Albion under three different managers, but he has accumulated 76 games away from The Hawthorns since his loan move to Cheltenham in the summer of 2022. Albion have allowed Taylor to leave for loan spells with Cheltenham Town and Bolton Wanderers before this season in order to gain experience, and this season especially he has made his mark in League One.
Tom Hill has a score prediction for all 12 matches taking place in the Championship this weekend.
